config.script:
user_name = self.session.props.auth.user.userName
    pwd_field = self.getSibling("PasswordField")
    entered   = (pwd_field.props.text or "").strip()

    if not user_name:
        system.perspective.print("No user is currently logged in.")
        return
    if not entered:
        system.perspective.print("Please enter your password.")
        return

    # Trigger the configured Authentication Challenge on THIS page.
    # IMPORTANT: "ReAuth" must match the Challenge ID you configured in Designer.
    system.perspective.authenticationChallenge(
        pageId=self.page.id,
        challengeId="ReAuth"
    )

    # Clear the password box either way
    pwd_field.props.text = ""
